rows.notes: R61 runs only after a positive exact R60 carryover gate.
Source, lowered, internal linear, internal accelerated, and external final-value comparators must stay exact on the admitted rows.
R61 reports compile, frontend-lowering, trace-lowering, and end-to-end timing rather than headline runtime only.
Accelerated internal execution must remain exact and beat simpler transparent baselines after overhead accounting to count as bounded value.
